sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a cold, with symptoms including congestion and a runny nose. He also reports left hand pain and thought he had a slight fever recently. The patient reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports chest pain. The patient reports a cold. The patient reports left hand pain. The patient reports chest pain. The patient reports a slight fever.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient has cervical lymphadenopathy. Lung exam reveals bilateral ronchi and some wheezing. Oxygen saturation is 96%.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a cold and cervical lymphadenopathy. The patient is positive for covid.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor advises the patient to quarantine for 10 days. The doctor orders a lipid panel in six months. The patient should continue taking crestor 20 milligrams a day.
